title: SR 12-17 / CA 12-14: Supervisory Letter SR 12-17 / CA 12-14 on  Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions  -- December 17, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025
title_normalized: Supervisory Letter SR 12-17 / CA 12-14 on  Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions  -- December 17, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 12-17 / CA 12-14
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance does not apply to community banking organizations, defined as institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH RESERVE BANK AND TO DOMESTIC AND FOREIGN LARGE FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS
bm25_text: SR 12-17 / CA 12-14 Supervisory Letter SR 12-17 / CA 12-14 on  Consolidated Supervision Framework for Large Financial Institutions  -- December 17, 2012 -- Revised October 1, 2025 to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance does not apply to community banking organizations, defined as institutions supervised by the Federal Reserve with total consolidated assets of $10 billion or less.
